title: Tempting Aussie Tofu Bites
description: A delicious, crispy, and savory snack inspired by Australian cuisine, made with tofu and served with a side of tangy rice.

ingredients.name: rice
ingredients.notes: cooked and seasoned with salt and pepper

instructions: Preheat oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (180°C).
In a bowl, mix together crumbled tofu, crushed bites, australian seasoning, and tempting sauce.
Using a spoon, drop small amounts of the tofu mixture into the hot oil.
Fry the tofu bites until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove from oil with a slotted spoon and place on paper towels to drain excess oil.
Serve hot with a side of seasoned rice.
